narrative:
Middleburg Heights-02-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 860 registered voters, with 57.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.3 percentage points.
